### Requirements

- [ ] Project Management >> Customer available in Reassure
- [ ] Project Management >> Project available in Exact Online
- [ ] Is there need to migrate billing ownership to Intercept [use this link](https://github.com/InterceptBV/RULES-OF-ENGAGEMENT/wiki#devops)
- [ ] Sales/CSM do we need to move Azure Subscriptons to Intercept CSP: `xxx`
- [ ] Customer needs to know that the user that will start onboarding has the following access level:
-  [ ] Global Admin in the Entra ID
-  [ ] Owner on the subscription that needs to be onboarded
- [ ] CSM >> Setup QBR

---

#### STEP A - Run onboarding by customer
   - [ ] Customer >> More details can be found [here](https://github.com/InterceptBV/ms-onboardingv2/wiki)

#### STEP B -Check
   - [ ] Engineer >> Check Monitoring and alerting
   - [ ] Engineer >> inform customer how to tag resources for Update Management
   - [ ] Engineer >> Check if there is already a WIKI for the customer and provide the information needed there. 

#### STEP C - Customer Care
   - [ ] Customer Care >> Customer in TOPdesk, via Reassure function
